name: superdev
description: 16-skill full-stack toolkit plus 51 bundled role prompts for monorepo builds, audits, migrations, QA, debugging, and frontend refactoring. v1.4.0 adds a Laravel backend option — laravel-enterprise-backend (Laravel 13 + CockroachDB + database cache/sessions + SQS; spatie/laravel-data contracts; #[Audit] attribute; Title-Case enums; Laravel Boost) and laravel-bref-deploy (AWS Lambda serverless via Bref 3.x) — selectable through a backend-stack gate in the orchestrator. v1.5.0 adds design-to-laravel (Claude Design → Laravel + Inertia 3 + React 19 monolith) as the default frontend for the Laravel option, selectable via an orchestrator frontend-stack gate (Inertia vs Next.js).

interface.shortDescription: Full-stack build, audit, QA, migration, and refactoring skills.
interface.longDescription: Superdev brings Codex a skill-first full-stack toolkit for PRD-to-product builds, design-to-Next.js conversion, NestJS backends, prototype migration, QA, security review, debugging, product-completeness audits, frontend modularization, and atomic refactoring. The bundled Claude subagent files are kept as reusable role prompts; Codex runs the workflows through skills and explicit delegation.
defaultPrompt: Use Superdev to audit this product before ship.
Use Superdev to productionize this prototype.
Use Superdev to build from my PRD and design.
